name: tradethos
description: Build and manage custom stock baskets, indexes, and ETF-style portfolios using Robinhood market data.

interface.shortDescription: Create your own stock baskets, indexes, and ETF-style portfolios.
interface.longDescription: Tradethos helps you build and manage custom stock baskets, indexes, and ETF-style portfolios. It uses Robinhood MCP market data for research, screening, portfolio tracking, and safety-focused equity-order review.
defaultPrompt: Create an index of dividend-growth stocks.
Review my basket allocations and drift.
